title: Dance Workshop – Seattle Color Festival
description: Our much-loved, crowd-favorite dance workshop did it again! Our choreographer and director had the crowd rocking under the Seattle Space Needle at the Seattle Color Festival! The energy, the music, and the vibes were absolutely unforgettable.

title: Holi 2026 – Seattle Color Festival
description: What an incredible opportunity with AmPowering! We had the honor of performing at the Seattle Color Festival in front of thousands of people — and the energy was absolutely electric! It's truly heartwarming to see the crowd come alive, enjoying the music, the colors, and the spirit of celebration together. Avani Desai.

title: Silk of Road – IKEA Performing Arts Center
description: Kicking off 2026 with our very first performance at Silk of Road at the IKEA Performing Arts Center. What an honor to represent INDIA!

title: Year-End Celebration 2025
description: What a fantastic way to end the year! We are not just a dance school — we are a family. Watching our kids grow, shine, and support one another fills our hearts with so much joy. Thank you each one of you who created wonderful memories in 2025!

title: Diwali Family Festival – Seattle Asian Art Museum
description:
Bhangra dance performance and workshop at the Diwali Family Festival held at the Seattle Asian Art Museum. The festival celebrated the Festival of Lights with storytelling, live music, fashion shows, cultural performances, and hands-on art making.
Rhythms of India performed and led a Bhangra dance workshop alongside other cultural groups including Nrityashastra, Alapadma, Chennai Beats Dance Academy, and Naadanam Dance Academy.

title: Inclusive Dance Workshop
description: Our very inclusive dance workshop! Celebrating diversity and bringing the joy of Bhangra to everyone in the community.

title: Snoqualmie Block Party on the Ridge
description: We are performing here! If you wanna learn some Bhangra moves this is the best time! Thank you Snoqualmie Block Party on the Ridge and we are looking forward to it! Kaur ShubChintan, Avani Desai.

title: UtsavUSA Cultural Event
description: We are excited to be part of this event organized by UtsavUSA! A wonderful opportunity to showcase the vibrant energy of Bhangra at one of the region's premier cultural celebrations.

title: United Festival 2024 – Redmond
description: Crowd enjoying our dance workshop! When our Bhangra director Kaur ShubChintan leads the workshop, the energy is contagious! Thanks to The Emotional Abuse Discussion for inviting us at United Festival 2024! Performed at City of Redmond – Parks & Recreation.

title: A Day of Uplifting – Bellingham
description:
League of Women Voters event – A Day of Uplifting the Black, Indigenous and People of Color in Whatcom County.
Glimpse of dance workshop at Bellingham, Washington Depot Market Square! Kaur ShubChintan, Avani Desai.

title: U District Fair 2023 – Seattle
description:
The University District Chamber of Commerce held Seattle's first modern street fair. Over the course of the weekend, 50,000 people visited stalls and tents set up by 300 vendors and artists. The festival featured continuous music including dance performances from around the world.
Thank you U District Street Fair for an opportunity!! We had a blast!! Kaur ShubChintan, Avani Desai.

title: United Festival – Redmond Park
description: Celebrate Asian American & Native Hawaiian/Pacific Islander heritage month in the City of Redmond! Our adult/youth BHANGRA group performed at City of Redmond – Parks & Recreation.

title: Seattle Events: Celebrate Asian American, Pacific Island Heritage
description:
This year's United Festival on May 20 has doubled in size to around 30 vendors and several performers and artists, all from Asian American and Pacific Islander communities.
Admission is free – dancing and art to vendors and food trucks, held from noon to 5 p.m. in Redmond's Downtown Park. Punjabi folk dance school Rhythms of India performed and led a dance workshop.

title: Conference for Agricultural Worker Health – Seattle Hyatt
description:
NACHC annual Conference for Agricultural Worker Health in Seattle, the only one of its kind dedicated solely to the health and well-being of America's migratory and seasonal agricultural workers and their families.
It was fun performing during agricultural conference week at Grand Hyatt-Seattle organized by National Association of Community Health Centers!

title: Seattle Celebrates Spring with Dancing, Music, Food at Holi Festival of Colors
description:
There was a celebration of spring in Seattle. The Holi Festival of Colors showed up downtown. The festival has its roots in India and celebrates diversity, art, and culture. After a decade of success in the Bellevue and Renton communities, organizers brought the festival downtown.
Seattle's Iconic & Biggest celebration of the Festival of Color – Holi right in front of Seattle's Icon, Space Needle at Seattle Center.

title: Holi 2023 Celebration – Seattle
description: The annual Celebrate Asia shines a spotlight on Seattle's vibrant Asian communities and its classical artists in one-of-a-kind programs. This concert is great for the whole family and features pre- and post-concert festivities at Benaroya Hall with local dancers and music ensembles.

title: Celebrating Asia – Benaroya Hall
description: As always most highlighted and powerful dance workshop by Kaur ShubChintan at Seattle Symphony At Benaroya Hall @celebrate Asia, with Avani Desai and Anju Gupta.

title: Performance and Dance Workshop at Unity Ball Bellingham
description: A wonderful performance and dance workshop event in Bellingham, Washington.
